subsystems.description: Mass flow controllers and gas distribution system for process gases

subsystems.description: Vacuum pump and pressure control system

subsystems.description: Wafer boat movement and positioning mechanism

subsystems.description: Sensors and alarms for process parameter monitoring

state_variables.name: heating_element_degradation
state_variables.description: Gradual increase in heating element resistance due to thermal cycling

state_variables.name: thermocouple_drift
state_variables.description: Thermocouple calibration drift from thermal exposure and contamination

state_variables.name: thermal_uniformity_loss
state_variables.description: Loss of temperature uniformity across zones due to element aging

state_variables.name: mfc_calibration_drift
state_variables.description: Mass flow controller calibration drift from thermal cycling and contamination

state_variables.name: valve_wear
state_variables.description: Control valve seat wear affecting flow control precision

state_variables.name: gas_line_contamination
state_variables.description: Particle and residue buildup in gas lines affecting flow

state_variables.name: pump_throughput_loss
state_variables.description: Vacuum pump throughput degradation from contamination and wear

state_variables.name: leak_accumulation
state_variables.description: Small leak development in vacuum system seals and fittings

state_variables.name: mechanical_wear
state_variables.description: Wear in boat positioning mechanism affecting accuracy

state_variables.name: sensor_drift
state_variables.description: Pressure and temperature sensor calibration drift

state_variables.name: alarm_threshold_drift
state_variables.description: Drift in alarm threshold settings due to electronic aging

state_variables.name: tube_contamination
state_variables.description: Deposition buildup on tube walls affecting process uniformity

state_variables.name: quartz_devitrification
state_variables.description: Quartz tube crystallization from repeated thermal cycling

usage_profiles.name: development
usage_profiles.description: R&D operation with varied recipes and frequent changes

field_generation_rules.generation_logic: Base temperature with degradation-induced drift and noise, affected by tube contamination buildup
Target pressure with pump degradation causing higher baseline and leak-induced drift
Actual flow with MFC drift, valve wear affecting control precision, and contamination effects
Recipe-driven setpoint values based on process step and gas type
Recipe-specified duration with minor variations for process control
Boolean alarm triggered when flow exceeds threshold, affected by MFC and threshold drift
Process recipe identifier determining gas flows, temperatures, and timing

degradation_model.accumulates_from: thermal cycling and gas exposure during all gas flow operations
evacuation operations and process gas exposure

maintenance_model.trigger: scheduled maintenance or flow accuracy degradation
vacuum performance degradation or scheduled service

failure_model.trigger_conditions: mfc_calibration_drift or valve_wear exceeds control limits

event_timing_model.arrival_process: Recipe-driven batch processing with deterministic timing within runs and stochastic intervals between runs
event_timing_model.notes: Process runs follow structured recipes with defined step durations, but run frequency depends on production schedule and maintenance windows

null_field_rules.reason: No process gas flows during vacuum operations
Boat movement occurs at atmospheric pressure without process timing
Maintenance operations do not involve normal process parameters or wafer lots
